name: Bradley County Recreational Park
description: Come play pickleball at Bradley County Recreational Park in Cleveland, TN! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Cleveland (TN) Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Cleveland (TN) Family YMCA in Cleveland, TN! There are 4 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Revolve Pickleball
description: Revolve Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cleveland, TN. There are 13 indoor hard and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to a pro shop or equipment store, locker rooms, restrooms, water, trainers or lessons, lights, and food. The courts can be reserved.
fees: Fee required — Visitors and Members are able to book courts and sign up for events (Open Play sessions). Members get discounted rates and other benefits.

name: Tinsley Recreation Center
description: Tinsley Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Cleveland, TN. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, water, and lights. The courts are free.
